Class MetaMemberView

java.lang.Object
org.openxava.view.meta.MetaMemberView
Direct Known Subclasses:
MetaCollectionView, MetaPropertyView, MetaReferenceView
public class MetaMemberView extends Object
A little minimum common denominator for MetaPropertyView, MetaReferenceView and MetaCollectionView.

Author:
Javier Paniza
